languages.text: {n}Покрытое имплантами лицо Себериана не выдает эмоций — только блеск в его уцелевшем глазу привлекает ваше внимание, прежде чем скрывается за длинными ресницами.{/n}
{n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Покрытое имплантами лицо Себериана не выдает эмоций — только блеск в его уцелевшем глазу привлекает ваше внимание, прежде чем скрывается за длинными ресницами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his surviving eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}
{n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his surviving eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}
{n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}
{n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberians mit Implantaten übersätes Gesicht zeigt keinerlei Emotion. Lediglich ein Funkeln in seinem verbliebenden Auge weckt kurz deine Aufmerksamkeit, ehe es hinter langen Lidern verschwindet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberians mit Implantaten übersätes Gesicht zeigt keinerlei Emotion. Lediglich ein Funkeln in seinem verbliebenden Auge weckt kurz deine Aufmerksamkeit, ehe es hinter langen Lidern verschwindet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le visage recouvert d'implants de Seberian ne laisse transparaître aucune émotion ; c'est à peine si vous remarquez une faible lueur dans son œil encore valide avant qu'elle ne disparaisse derrière de longs cils.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage recouvert d'implants de Seberian ne laisse transparaître aucune émotion ; c'est à peine si vous remarquez une faible lueur dans son œil encore valide avant qu'elle ne disparaisse derrière de longs cils.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El rostro cubierto de implantes de Seberian no deja ver ni rastro de emociones. Solo captas un instante de brillo en el ojo que le queda antes de que se esconda entre sus largas pestañas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro cubierto de implantes de Seberian no deja ver ni rastro de emociones. Solo captas un instante de brillo en el ojo que le queda antes de que se esconda entre sus largas pestañas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın implantlarla kaplı yüzü, hiçbir duygu ele vermiyor. Sadece kalan gözündeki bir parıltı dikkatini çekiyor ki bu da sonrasında uzun kirpiklerinin altında kayboluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın implantlarla kaplı yüzü, hiçbir duygu ele vermiyor. Sadece kalan gözündeki bir parıltı dikkatini çekiyor ki bu da sonrasında uzun kirpiklerinin altında kayboluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安那张布满植入物的脸上没有流露任何情绪，你只看到他那只仅存的眼睛里闪过一丝光芒，随后便消失在长长的睫毛之下。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安那张布满植入物的脸上没有流露任何情绪，你只看到他那只仅存的眼睛里闪过一丝光芒，随后便消失在长长的睫毛之下。{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの顔は埋め込まれたインプラントで感情を表さない。残された目は光を放ち、長いまつげの下に消えていく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's implant-covered face betrays no emotion, only a glint in his remaining eye catching your attention before it disappears beneath long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの顔は埋め込まれたインプラントで感情を表さない。残された目は光を放ち、長いまつげの下に消えていく。{/n}
